pre-checks.name: MAX_SIZE_CHECK
pre-checks.description: Checks if the file is over the maximum extraction size

pre-checks.name: MIN_SIZE_CHECK
pre-checks.description: Checks if the file has the minimum extraction size

pre-checks.name: PAGE_CHECK
pre-checks.description: Checks if the file fits the page extraction limit

pre-checks.name: AGE_CHECK
pre-checks.description: Checks if the file creation date is in the accepted interval

consistency-checks.name: STRUCTURE_CHECK
consistency-checks.description: Checks structure of the extracted payload
